name: DISPOVAN 10ML
description: Medical syringe device for precise fluid administration or measurement.

name: DISPRIN 325MG 1*10TAB
description: Pain relief medicine used to treat various types of pain, including toothache, headache, sore throat, muscle pain, and migraine. Dissolves in water for rapid absorption.
dosage: Do not take more than 12 tablets in 24 hours. Wait at least 4 hours between doses. Not recommended for children under 16 years.
storageInstructions: Store below 30°C. Keep away from children and pets.

name: DOXINATE PLUS 1*30TAB
description: Combination medicine containing doxylamine, pyridoxine and folic acid used to prevent nausea and vomiting during pregnancy (morning sickness).
uses: Prevention of nausea and vomiting during pregnancy
dosage: Take as directed by doctor; take on empty stomach for optimal results.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C in a clean and dry place, protected from moisture, sunlight and heat.

name: DROGYNA 10*8
description: Hormonal pill used in the treatment of menstrual problems containing synthetic progesterone.
dosage: As prescribed by doctor; take orally with water without breaking the tablet.
storageInstructions: Store in a dry place, protected from light.

name: DR.ORTHO OIL
description: A blend of 8 ayurvedic herb extracts effective in relieving pains in muscles, back, legs, shoulders or joints.
dosage: Apply 5-10ml by gently massaging over affected areas. Use twice daily or as directed.

name: DUO 02 3ML
description: Combines Brinzolamide and Brimonidine to lower elevated pressure in the eyes.
dosage: Use as directed by physician; use the exact number of drops recommended.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place.

name: DYDROBOON TAB 1*10
description: Synthetic progesterone tablet used to treat gynaecological and menstrual problems caused by low progesterone levels.
dosage: As prescribed by doctor; swallow whole with water; same time daily.
storageInstructions: Store in a dry place, protected from light.

name: EASIBREATH CAP 1*10
description: Nasal decongestant used to relieve blockage in nasal passages caused by cold and respiratory tract infections.
dosage: Inhalation only — tear capsule and pour contents into warm water to inhale vapors. Not for children under 3 months.
storageInstructions: Store in a cool and dry place.
